ModMetaData.name: HSK Patch: VQE Cryptoforge
ModMetaData.author: CarbineAction
ModMetaData.description:
Hardcore SK + Combat Extended compatibility patch for Vanilla Quests Expanded — Cryptoforge.
This patch bundles the official upstream CE patch (PR #3780 by Airomeda, merged into CombatExtended-Continued 2025-04-25) so it works inside HSK's stripped CE redistribution, then layers HSK-native material swaps on top.
Bundled CE patches (covers crypto weapons, apparel, race, hediffs, sentry): - VQEC_Things_Weapons.xml (Cryptobolter + Cryptoaxe CE conversion) - VQEC_Apparel_Various.xml (4 crypto armor pieces, CE armor scale + Bulk) - VQEC_Races_Animal_Insect.xml (cryptofused insectoid armor) - VQEC_Things_Sentry.xml (ancient turret CE) - VQEC_Hediffs_Global_Misc.xml - VQEC_Ammo_Cryptoforge.xml (defines crypto bolt ammo + AmmoSet)
HSK overlay (this mod's contribution): - Ammo recipe: Steel → SteelBar so HSK colonists craft from refined alloys - Building costLists: Steel → SteelBar across 25 deconstructable structures (cryptopods, production benches, turrets, ship debris, decorative) - Cryptopod costLists: Uranium → DepletedUranium (HSK refined isotope)
Required: Vanilla Quests Expanded - Cryptoforge, Hardcore SK, Combat Extended.
